description: Letter from Yosef b. Gershon (a French scholar appointed by the Nagid Avraham Maimonides to be one of the three judges of the Jewish community in Alexandria), probably written to the Nagid. In Hebrew. Complaining about one of his fellow judges, whose name is not preserved, and seeking confirmation of his position from the local non-Jewish authorities. Also mentions the third judge, Eliyya, with whom he is pleased, and Ṭahīr, an elder of the community. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מיוסף ב. גרשון (חוקר צרפתי שמונה על ידי הנגיד אברהם מימוניד לשמש כאחד משלושת שופטי הקהילה היהודית באלכסנדריה). בעברית. מתלונן על עמיתו ומבקש אישור מרשויות לא-יהודיות
